anaSayfa.hakkımdaMetin1: I've always had games, systems, and ideas in my mind. While trying to mod games in middle and high school, I realized something: creating is more enjoyable than playing.
anaSayfa.hakkımdaMetin2: In 2023, I started game development with Unity. Over time, I grew eager to expand beyond games into apps, developer tools, and tech devices.
anaSayfa.hakkımdaMetin3: My current focus is publishing games under my own brand, building useful apps and game development plugins, and creating fun devices.

henüzHazırDeğil.açıklama: This content isn't ready yet. It'll be here soon!

iletişim.açıklamaMetin: Have an idea, suggestion, or question? Use this form to reach me directly. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
